title: Lumu's better crafting
description: Adds crafting recipes to un-obtainable items in survival, as well as adding recipes for un-craftable blocks, and some QoL recipes
body:
Adds crafting recipes to un-obtainable items in survival, as well as adding recipes for un-craftable blocks, and some QoL recipes.

**_Here is the Full list for v1.0_**


<details>
